reviews.comment:
La nafta debería estar un poco más barata. Están en zona petrolera, el flete no cuesta nada en esa zona.

(Translated by Google)
Gasoline should be a bit cheaper. They're in an oil-producing region; freight is practically free there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNWJMRlBREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. El restaurante es amplio, muy limpio, la aten primaria excelente. La comida llegó rapidísimo!! Riquísima! Los baños impecables.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. The restaurant is spacious, very clean, and the front-of-house service was excellent. The food arrived incredibly fast! Delicious! The restrooms were spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaGQyYUlBEAE

reviews.comment:
Larga fila en el baño de mujeres xq solo habia uno limpio, poca limpieza!

(Translated by Google)
Long line at the women's bathroom because only one was clean, poor cleaning!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNlliYWFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un desastre..los baños sucios y sin agua corriente..en pandemia piden distanciamiento pero no limpian ni tienen alcohol en gel.
Todo caro.solo les interesa vender.
Enormes colas para cargar combustibles y en el mercado.
Pregunte por un encargado y me contestaron que no habia...

(Translated by Google)
A disaster... the bathrooms are filthy and have no running water. During the pandemic, they're asking for social distancing, but they don't clean or have hand sanitizer. Everything is expensive. They're only interested in making a sale. There are huge lines for fuel and at the market. I asked for a manager and they told me there wasn't one.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXb2FLTDJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tenían vigente la aplicación para el pago de QR para darte Factura A.
Si querías factura tenías q pagar en efectivo.
Sin embargo la atención del playero fue muy buena

(Translated by Google)
They didn't have the QR code payment app up and running to issue invoices. If you wanted an invoice, you had to pay in cash. However, the gas station attendant was very helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXdnVQNmNnEAE
